introSequence pt1_1 <style:intro>: In the days of yore, a colossal conflict erupted between two dominating species: [
introSequence pt1_2 <style:intro>: The MONSTERS, known for their diplomacy and honor...
introSequence pt1_3 <style:intro>: And the HUMANS, fueled by their unquenchable thirst for power.
introSequence pt1_4 <style:intro>: The conflict raged across the surface...
introSequence pt1_5 <style:intro>: In the end, the humans emerged victorious by a landslide...
introSequence pt1_6 <style:intro>: Using magic, the humans imprisoned the monsters far below the earth, erasing their legacy from the face of it.
introSequence pt1_7 <style:intro>: With defeat came an ache to devour one's soul, turning monster against monster..
introSequence pt1_9 <style:intro>: But all were met with fiery indignation...
introSequence pt1_10 <style:intro>: Leaving the land utterly scorched and devastated.
introSequence pt1_11 <style:intro>: And so, monsters lay in silent anticipation...
introSequence pt2_2 <style:intro>: Over the ages, many have tried conquering the legendary peak...
introSequence pt2_3 <style:intro>: ...Only to be met with a grim fate, time and time again.
introSequence Asgore_1 <style:intro - as: Those cursed humans must pay for every injustice...
introSequence Asgore_2 <style:intro - as: Every hardship they have wrought upon us!
introSequence Asgore_3 <style:intro - as: Their betrayal will never be forgotten, nor forgiven...
introSequence Asgore_4 <style:intro - as: With the combined power of seven human souls, and the barrier broken...
introSequence Asgore_5 <style:intro - as: We will reclaim our rightful land and end humanity's reign, once and for all!
